scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix lambda && npm install --prefix infrastructure
scripts.deploy:dns: npm run --prefix infrastructure -- cdk deploy ConnectDnsStack
scripts.deploy:dynamo: npm run --prefix infrastructure -- cdk deploy ConnectDynamoStack
scripts.deploy:backend: npm run --prefix infrastructure -- cdk deploy ConnectBackendStack
scripts.deploy:frontend: npm run --prefix infrastructure -- cdk deploy ConnectFrontendStack
